folio.label: 98r
folio.l: ¢ There may no thyngö , so god my soule saue
Lykyngö to ©ow , that may displese me
Ne I desire , no thyngö for to haue
Ne drede for to lese , saue oonly ©e
This wyl is in myn hert , and ay shal be
No lengthe of tyme , or detú , may this deface
Ne chaunge my corage , to a nother place
¢ Glad was this Markys , of hire answerynge
But ©et he feyned , as he were nat so
Al drery was his chere , and his lokynge
Whan that he shulde , out of the chaumbre goo
Sone after this , a furlongö weye or twoo
He preuyly hatú told , al his entente
Vn to a man , and to his wyf hi~ sente
¢ A maner of a Sergeaunt , was this pryue man
The whicú he feitúful , often founden had
In thynges greete , and eke swicú folk wel can
Don execuciou~ , on thynges badde
The lord knew wel , that he hi~ loued and dradde
And whan this sergeau~t , knew his lordes wylle
In to the chaumbre , he stalketú hi~ ful stille
¢ Madame he seide , ©e mot for©eue it me
Thougú I do thyngö , to whicú I am constreyned
ñe ben so wys , that rigút wel knowen ©e
That lordes hestes , moun nat ben feyned
They moun wel ben be weilled , or compleyned
But men must nedes , to here lust obeye
And so wol I , there nys nomore to seye
¢ This child am I , comaunded for to take

note.notetxt: 533There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: And spak nomore , but out the child he hent
Dispetously , and gan a cher make
As thougú he wolde , han slayn it or he went
Grisildis mot al suffre , and al consent
And as a lomb , she sittetú meke and stille
And leet this cruel Sergeau~t , don his wille
¢ Suspecious was the diffame , of this man
Suspect his face , suspect his word also
Suspect the tyme , in whicú he this bygan
Allas hire dougúter , that she loued so
She wende he wolde , han slayn it rigút thoo
But nathelees , she neither wep~ ne syked
Conformynge hire , to that the Markys lyked
¢ But at the laste , to speken she bygan
And mekely she , to the Sergeau~t preyede
So as he was , a worthy gentil man
That she must kysse hire child , er that it deyede
And in hire arm , this likel child she leyde
